subject: A massive serpentine energy creature of crackling blue force tears through armored figures in a violent collision
description: The image is dominated by a massive swirling serpentine or dragon-like form composed entirely of crackling electric-blue energy, with curved horn-like projections extending from its mass. Within or riding the energy form, a small humanoid figure is barely distinguishable. In the lower left, a large armored figure has been knocked prone, rendered in dark tones with red accents suggesting defeated or dying state. To the lower right, another armored figure stands amid the chaos. The entire composition is an explosion of blue energy and dark fragments, conveying violent kinetic force.
foreground: Fallen armored figure and standing armored figure amid dark debris
background: Massive serpentine blue energy creature filling the upper frame
